title: Blueprint Swarm - Competitive Synthesis
description: Cross-call competitive intelligence synthesis aggregating all competitor mentions, positioning, and win rates

name.description: Competitor name as mentioned in calls

total_mentions.description: Total number of calls where this competitor was mentioned

evaluation.description: Number of mentions in an active evaluation context (prospect evaluating both)

comparison.description: Number of mentions comparing features or capabilities

switching_to.description: Number of mentions where customer/prospect is switching TO this competitor

switching_from.description: Number of mentions where customer/prospect is switching FROM this competitor

positive.description: Number of mentions with positive sentiment about the competitor

negative.description: Number of mentions with negative sentiment about the competitor

contexts.description: Breakdown of mention contexts for this competitor

win_rate_when_mentioned.description: Win rate (%) when this competitor is mentioned in the deal (null if insufficient data)

common_positioning.description: How prospects typically position this competitor relative to the seller (e.g., 'Cheaper but less feature-rich', 'Enterprise incumbent we need to displace')

key_quotes.description: Most revealing verbatim quotes about this competitor from calls

competitors.description: All competitors mentioned across calls, ranked by total mentions

competitive_landscape_summary.description: Executive-level narrative summarizing the competitive landscape — key battlegrounds, positioning effectiveness, and strategic recommendations
